has-arrow at 24506:

.dropdown-menu li:hover>.nested-menu {
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible;
}

    content: '›';
    font-size: 0.6rem;
    float: right;
    margin-left: 15px;
    margin-top: 3px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}
